title: Threat Actor by Snort IDs
description: Utilize this panel to correlate Snort intrusion events with known threat actors. Configure the Snort-ID-to-Threat-Actor lookup to enrich incoming signature data and populate the “Threat Actors by Snort IDs” view.

viz_kpJB7bW3.description: Matching Snort Intrusion Events within a time_window of 1d
viz_kpJB7bW3.title: Snort Intrusion Events by dest_ip  - $threat_actor_token$

options.query:
|inputlookup snort_ids_threat_actor.csv 
|  table threat_actor signature_id description distinct_count_snort_ids

`cisco_secure_firewall` EventType=IntrusionEvent 
| bin _time span=1d
| stats count AS Total_Alerts dc(signature_id) AS sig_count
        values(signature_id)       AS signature_ids
        values(signature)          AS signature
        values(class_desc)         AS class_desc
        values(MitreAttackGroups)  AS MitreAttackGroups
        values(InlineResult)       AS InlineResult
        values(InlineResultReason) AS InlineResultReason
        values(src_ip)             AS src_ip
        values(dest_port)          AS dest_port
        values(rule)               AS rule
        values(transport)          AS transport
        values(app)                AS app
  BY dest_ip, _time
| eval sig_ids_str = mvjoin(signature_ids, ",")
| lookup snort_ids_threat_actor.csv signature_id AS sig_ids_str 
    OUTPUT threat_actor, distinct_count_snort_ids, description
| where isnotnull(threat_actor) 
    AND sig_count >= tonumber(distinct_count_snort_ids)
| mvexpand signature_ids
| rename signature_ids AS signature_id
| where threat_actor="$threat_actor_token$"
| timechart span=5m count BY signature_id

`cisco_secure_firewall` EventType=IntrusionEvent 
| bin _time span=1d
| stats count as Total_Alerts dc(signature_id) as sig_count 
        values(signature_id) as signature_ids 
        values(signature) as signature 
        values(class_desc) as class_desc 
        values(MitreAttackGroups) as MitreAttackGroups 
        values(InlineResult) as InlineResult 
        values(InlineResultReason) as InlineResultReason 
        values(src_ip) as src_ip 
        values(dest_port) as dest_port 
        values(rule) as rule 
        values(transport) as transport 
        values(app) as app
        by dest_ip _time
| eval sig_ids_str = mvjoin(signature_ids, ",")
| lookup snort_ids_threat_actor.csv signature_id as sig_ids_str OUTPUT threat_actor, distinct_count_snort_ids, description
| where isnotnull(threat_actor) AND sig_count >= tonumber(distinct_count_snort_ids)
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)`
| `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
| table _time threat_actor description dest_ip signature_ids signature src_ip  MitreAttackGroups
|  search threat_actor="$threat_actor_token$"

items.label: Threat Actors and Snort IDs mapping
